TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tsai Ing-wen(lalu na plmukan'ŤĒ°ŤčĪśĖá', lalu na Paywang'Tjuku', ryax sa 31 na byacing tay 8 squ kawas na 1956 - squ ) hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. mrhuw Taywan ta' misuw hya' ga Tsai Ing-wen, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ts~…ēai iŇč-wen(lalu na plmukan Ē*** Ē, lalu na pajwaŇč Ētjuku Ē, rjax s~…ēa ** na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - s~…ēqu ) ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a. mrńßuw tajwan ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ts~…ēai iŇč-wen, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
